channel.title: stackshareio/awesome-stacks Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: stackshareio/awesome-stacks Sep 21st, 2020
item.description:
Front-end

Nextjs Blog Starter ↗

  • Next.js - 🛠 - 🐙stars66.8k - The React Framework for server rendering, static websites, PWAs.
  • React - 🛠 - 🐙stars168.1k - React components can be used on the client and server side.
  • TypeScript - 🛠️ - 🐙stars70.7k - A typed superset of JavaScript that compiles to plain JavaScript.
  • eslint - 🛠️ - 🐙stars18.5k - The pluggable linting utility for JavaScript and JSX.
  • Babel - 🛠️ - 🐙stars39k - A JavaScript compiler; use next generation JavaScript, today.
  • PostCSS - 🛠 - 🐙stars24.5k - A tool for transforming CSS with JavaScript.
  • Netlify - 🛠️ - Netlify is a global CDN that makes continuous deployments as simple as a few clicks.

    • Front-end

    Resources
  • Nextjs Blog Starterstars196
  • Nextjs Blog Starter Demo

item.title: stackshareio/awesome-stacks Jul 24th, 2020
item.description:
Full stack

Resources
  • Github
  • Boilerplatestars5
  • How to install FReMP Stack on Ubuntu?
  • How to build a full stack web app using FReMP?
  • How to deploy the app to Heroku?
  • Official Website

    • Full stack

    FReMP: Flask ReactJS MongoDB Python ↗

  • Flask - 🛠️ - 🐙stars54.8k - The Python micro framework for building web applications.
  • ReactJS - 🛠️ - 🐙stars168.1k - A declarative, efficient, and flexible JavaScript library for building user interfaces.
  • MongoDB - 🛠️ - 🐙stars19.7k - A document and JSON-oriented database.
  • Python - 🛠️ - 🐙stars37.8k - A programming language that lets you work quickly.

item.title: stackshareio/awesome-stacks Feb 11th, 2020

Resources

item.title: stackshareio/awesome-stacks Oct 20th, 2019
item.description:
Front-end

React Next Boilerplate ↗

  • Next.js - 🛠 - 🐙stars66.8k - The React Framework for server rendering, static websites, PWAs.
  • React Testing Library - 🛠 - 🐙stars14.4k - react-testing-library is a tool in the Testing Frameworks category of a tech stack.
  • Emotion - 🛠 - 🐙stars13k - CSS-in-JS library designed for high performance style composition.
  • I18next - 🐙stars5.6k - I18next is an internationalization-framework written in and for JavaScript. But it's much more than that.
  • Redux Saga - 🐙stars21.6k - is a library that aims to make application side effects (i.e. asynchronous things like data fetching and impure things like accessing the browser cache) easier to manage, more efficient to execute, easy to test, and better at handling failures.

    • Front-end

    Resources
  • react-next-boilerplatestars148

    • Back-end

    GCP Kubernetes Stack ↗

  • Docker - 🛠 - 🐙stars60.2k - A tool to create, deploy and run applications inside containers.
  • Stackdriver - 🛠️ - Stackdriver Logging allows you to store, search, analyze, monitor, and alert on log data and events.

item.title: stackshareio/awesome-stacks Jun 19th, 2019
item.description:
Back-end

RESTful API with Java and Spring Boot ↗

  • Spring Boot - 🛠 - 🐙stars55k - Spring Boot makes it easy to create stand-alone, production-grade Spring based Applications that you can "just run".
  • Gradle - 🛠️ - 🐙stars11.8k- A build tool with a focus on build automation and support for multi-language development.
  • Java - 🛠️ - Java is an Object-Oriented and one of the most used programming languages in the world.

    • Back-end

    Resources

  • Building an Application with Spring Boot

item.title: stackshareio/awesome-stacks Jun 10th, 2019
item.description:

Serverless Stack with React on AWS ↗

    Vue SPA with Laravel ↗

  • Laravel - 🛠 - 🐙stars65k - One of the most popular Object Oriented MVC PHP Framework with elegant syntax and golden standard software patterns.

item.title: stackshareio/awesome-stacks Jun 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Full stack

Strapi CMS with Gatsby ↗

  • Strapi CMS - 🐙stars36.4k - Strapi is the Headless CMS developers love.

    • Full stack

    Rock Solid Modern Rails ↗

  • GraphQL Ruby - 🛠 - 🐙stars4.7k - Ruby server implementation of the GraphQL specification.
  • Apollo Client - 🛠 - 🐙stars16.1k - A powerfully extensible GraphQL JavaScript client.
  • Heroku - 🛠️ Developer friendly web app infrastructure provider with seamless Ruby/Rails support.
  • Rails - 🛠 - 🐙stars48.4k - An established web app framework with a focus on simplicity and productivity.

    • Full stack

    Serverless Stack with React on AWS ↗

  • Amazon S3 - 🛠️ - Store and retrieve any amount of data, at any time, from anywhere on the web.
  • Amazon CloudFront - 🛠️ - Content delivery with low latency and high data transfer speeds.

    • Full stack

    Vue SPA with Laravel ↗

  • PHP 7 - 🛠 - 🐙stars30.6k - A popular general-purpose scripting language that is especially suited for web development.

    • Back-end

    GCP Kubernetes Stack ↗

  • Kubernetes - 🐙stars77k - 🛠 - Production-Grade Container Scheduling and Management.

    • Back-end

    User Behavior Analytics via Segment ↗

  • Amplitude - 🛠️ - User analytics to fuel explosive user growth.
  • FullStory - 🛠️ - Capture all your customer experience data in one powerful, easy-to-use platform.

    • Back-end

    Self-Hosted Devops and Collaboration ↗

  • Sentry - 🛠 - 🐙stars28k - Cross-platform application monitoring, with a focus on error reporting.
  • GitLab - 🛠 - 🐙stars22.6k - Open source self-hosted Git management software.
  • Zulip - 🛠 - 🐙stars13.5k - Powerful open source team chat.
  • Hubot - 🛠 - 🐙stars15.9k - A customizable life embetterment robot.
  • Taiga.io - 🛠 - 🐙 - Project management web application with scrum in mind.
  • Metabase - 🛠 - 🐙stars24.8k - An open-source business intelligence tool.

    • Front-end

    React Firebase starter ↗

  • Firebase - 🛠️ - A cloud-hosted NoSQL database that lets you store and sync data between your users in real-time.

    • Mobile

    React Native with Expo and Hasura ↗

  • Hasura - 🛠️ - 🐙stars21.6k - Blazing fast, instant real-time GraphQL APIs on Postgres with fine grained access control.

    • Mobile

    Resources
  • Integrating Jira, GitHub, Jenkins, and Slack in your workflow

    • Back-end

    Rails Monitoring Stack ↗

  • Skylight - 🛠 - The smart profiler for your Rails apps.
  • New Relic - 🛠 - SaaS Application Performance Management for Ruby, PHP, .Net, Java, Python, and Node.js Apps.
  • Sqreen - 🛠 - Security monitoring and protection for Ruby, PHP, Java, Go, Python, and Node.js Apps.

    • Back-end

    Streaming Analytics with Kafka, Spark, and Cassandra ↗

  • Kafka - 🛠 - 🐙stars18.8k - Distributed, fault tolerant, high throughput pub-sub messaging system.
  • Apache Spark - 🛠 - 🐙stars29.6k - Fast and general engine for large-scale data processing.
  • Cassandra - 🛠 - 🐙stars6.6k - Highly-scalable partitioned row store.

item.title: stackshareio/awesome-stacks May 23rd, 2019

item.title: stackshareio/awesome-stacks Apr 23rd, 2019
item.description:
Full stack

Vue SPA with Laravel ↗

  • Vue.js - 🛠️ - 🐙stars183.1k - An approachable core library that focuses on the view layer only.
  • Laravel Mix - 🐙stars4.7k - A build tool built on top of webpack, to easily compile any front end assets. (secret: works with or without Laravel)
  • Babel - 🛠️ - 🐙stars39k - compiler for writing next generation JavaScript; Babel will turn your ES6+ code into ES5 friendly code, so you can start using it right now without waiting for browser support.
  • Sass - 🛠️ - 🐙stars13.2k - Sass is an extension of CSS3, adding nested rules, variables, mixins, selector inheritance, and more. It's translated to well-formatted, standard CSS using the command line tool or a web-framework plugin.

    • Full stack

    Resources
  • Building a Vue SPA with Laravel
  • Laravel Tutorial: Step by Step Guide to Building Your First Laravel Application

item.title: stackshareio/awesome-stacks Apr 19th, 2019
item.description:
Full stack

Code Coverage & CI ↗

  • CircleCI - 🛠 - Popular managed CI server.
  • Codecov - 🛠️ - Hosted coverage reports with awesome features to enhance your CI workflow.
  • Bash - 🛠 - The Bourne Again SHell is an sh-compatible shell.
  • GitHub - 🛠 - Powerful collaboration, review, and code management for open source and private development projects.

    • Full stack

    Resources
  • Making code coverage easy to see with Codecov & CircleCI
  • CI Provider Relationship
  • Codecov Bash Uploader

item.title: stackshareio/awesome-stacks Apr 17th, 2019

item.title: stackshareio/awesome-stacks Apr 16th, 2019
item.description:
Back-end

Production Ready Django + Docker ↗

  • Django - 🛠 - 🐙stars57.3k - The Web framework for perfectionists with deadlines.
  • Docker - 🛠 - 🐙stars60.2k - A tool to create, deploy and run applications inside containers.
  • GitLab - 🛠 - 🐙stars22.6k - Open source self-hosted Git management software.
  • Caddy - 🛠 - 🐙 - The HTTP/2 Web Server with Automatic HTTPS.

    • Back-end

    Resources
  • wemake-django-templatestars1.2k
  • kafka-sparkstreaming-cassandrastars91
  • Applying the Lambda Architecture with Spark, Kafka, and Cassandra
  • Streaming Analytics with Spark, Kafka, Cassandra, and Akka

    • Front-end

    Nuxt, TypeScript + Docker ↗

  • Nuxt - 🛠 - 🐙stars36k - Vue.js Meta Framework to create complex, fast & universal web applications quickly.

    • Back-end

    User Behavior Analytics via Segment ↗

  • Segment - 🛠️ - A single hub to collect, translate and send your data with the flip of a switch.
  • Google Analytics - 🛠️ - Enterprise-class web analytics.

  • TypeScript - 🛠️ - 🐙stars70.7k - A typed superset of JavaScript that compiles to plain JavaScript.
  • Sass - 🛠️ - 🐙stars13.2k - Sass is an extension of CSS3, adding nested rules, variables, mixins, selector inheritance, and more. It's translated to well-formatted, standard CSS using the command line tool or a web-framework plugin.
  • Jest - 🛠️ - 🐙stars35.1k - A comprehensive, delightful JavaScript testing solution.
  • eslint - 🛠️ - 🐙stars18.5k - The pluggable linting utility for JavaScript and JSX.
  • stylelint - 🛠️ - 🐙stars8.7k - A mighty, modern linter that helps you avoid errors and enforce conventions in your styles.
  • Docker - 🛠 - 🐙stars60.2k A tool to create, deploy and run applications inside containers.

  • GitHub - 🛠 - The site to keep your code and open it to world.
  • Jira - 🛠️ - Agile software development.

item.title: stackshareio/awesome-stacks Apr 12th, 2019
item.description:
Full stack

Strapi CMS with Gatsby ↗

  • Gatsby - 🛠 - 🐙stars50.2k - Gatsby is a blazing fast modern site generator for React.

    • Full stack

    Resources
  • Building a Static Blog using Gatsby and Strapi
  • Learn Gatsby with Strapi Headless CMS Video Series
  • Deploying Strapi to Heroku

    • Front-end

    Progressive Web App with Gatsby ↗

  • Contentful - 🛠 - 🐙 - Contentful is a flexible and future-friendly content platform that helps editors to manage and developers to serve content into mobile or web applications. Last but not least a powerhouse when worked with Gatsby.

    • Mobile

    Unity Game Development boilerplate ↗

  • Plastic SCM - 🛠️ - 🐙stars4 - PlasticSCM Docker image.
  • TeamCity - 🛠 - A Java-based build management and continuous integration server from JetBrains.

    • Front-end

    React Firebase starter ↗

  • Create React App - 🛠 - 🐙stars87.8k - Set up a modern web app by running one command.

item.title: stackshareio/awesome-stacks Apr 11th, 2019
item.description:
Full stack

Vue with Electron ↗

  • Electron - 🛠️ - 🐙stars91.7k - Build cross-platform desktop apps with JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.
  • Vue.js - 🛠️ - 🐙stars183.1k - An approachable core library that focuses on the view layer only.
  • Vuex - 🛠 - 🐙stars55.9k - Predictable state container for JavaScript apps.
  • Vue Router - 🐙stars18k - Vue Router is the official router for Vue.js.
  • Vue CLI - 🐙stars27.8k - An approachable core library that focuses on the view layer only.
  • electron-builder - 🐙stars10.5k - A complete solution to package and build a ready for distribution Electron app with “auto update” support out of the box.

    • Full stack

    Resources
  • Vue.js & Electron: The easy way. – Mikeal
  • How to use Vue.js with Electron and Vuex

    • Mobile

    Unity Game Development boilerplate ↗

  • Unity - 🛠 - 🐙stars7.8k - The C# part of the Unity engine and editor source code. May be used for reference purposes only.

    • Mobile

    Resources
  • First steps with Plastic SCM in Unity
  • Plastic SCM for Games

  • Create React App - 🛠 - 🐙stars87.8k - Set up a modern web app by running one command.

item.title: stackshareio/awesome-stacks Apr 9th, 2019
item.description:
Back-end

GCP Kubernetes Stack ↗

  • GKE - 🛠 - Kubernetes cluster managed by Google.

    • Full stack

    Electron React Boilerplate ↗

  • Electron - 🛠️ - 🐙stars91.7k - Build cross-platform desktop apps with JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.
  • React - 🛠 - 🐙stars168.1k - React components can be used on the client and server side.
  • Redux - 🛠 - 🐙stars55.9k - Predictable state container for JavaScript apps.
  • electron-builder - 🐙stars10.5k - A complete solution to package and build a ready for distribution Electron app with “auto update” support out of the box.

    • Full stack

    Resources
  • Electron React Boilerplate website
  • GraphCMS starter blog with React & Apollo Client
  • Static site search with Hugo + Algolia
  • serverless-stack.com

    • Full stack

    GraphCMS React + Apollo ↗

  • GraphCMS - 🛠️ - GraphCMS providing a backend to your app, giving you the tools to manage content.
  • Create React App - 🛠 - 🐙stars87.8k - Set up a modern web app by running one command.
  • Apollo - 🛠️ - 🐙stars16.1k - Apollo Client is the best way to use GraphQL to build client applications.

    • Mobile

    React Native with Expo and Hasura ↗

  • React Native - 🛠️ - 🐙stars95.3k - Build native mobile apps using JavaScript and React.
  • Expo - 🛠️ - 🐙stars13.6k - Build, deploy, and quickly iterate on native iOS and Android apps from the same JavaScript codebase.
  • Digital Ocean - 🛠️ - 🐙 - Deploy an SSD cloud server in less than 55 seconds with a dedicated IP and root access.
  • Auth0 - 🛠️ - A universal authentication & authorization platform for web, mobile and legacy applications.

    • Mobile

    Resources
  • Tutorial: Fullstack React Native with GraphQL and Authentication
  • Guide: Hasura GraphQL Engine One-click App on DigitalOcean Marketplace

    • Full stack

    Algolia site search ↗

  • hugo-algoliastars38 - 🐙stars38 - Generate and send indices from Hugo static sites for use with Algolia.
  • Algolia - 🛠 - Hosted search API, free up to 10,000 records.
  • DocSearch - 🐙stars191 - Crawls a website and uploads it to an index.
  • gatsby-plugin-algolia - 🐙stars157 - Use GraphQL to specify Gatsby object to index with Algolia (beta).
  • instantsearch.js - 🐙stars2.7k - JavaScript library for building performant and instant search experiences.

    • Front-end

    React starter kit ↗

  • GraphQL - 🛠 - 🐙stars17.6k - A query language for APIs and a runtime for fulfilling those queries with your existing data.
  • Babel - 🛠️ - 🐙stars39k - A JavaScript compiler; use next generation JavaScript, today.

    • Front-end

    Progressive Web App with Gatsby ↗

  • Gatsby - 🛠 - 🐙stars50.2k - Gatsby is a blazing fast modern site generator for React.
  • Cloud Firestore - 🛠️ - A noSQL cloud database that exposes event listeners for real-time updates.
  • Netlify - 🛠️ - Netlify is a global CDN that makes continuous deployments as simple as a few clicks.
  • styled components - 🛠 - 🐙stars33.5k - A react-specific css-in-js solution.

    • Front-end

    Resources
  • JAMstack PWA — Let’s Build a Polling App. with Gatsby.js, Firebase, and Styled-components
  • netlify-templates/victor-hugostars1.5k

    • Front-end

    Victor Hugo boilerplate ↗

  • Hugo - 🛠- 🐙stars51.8k - The world’s fastest framework for building websites.
  • Webpack - 🛠️ - 🐙stars58.2k - A static module bundler for modern JavaScript applications.
  • Babel - 🛠️ - 🐙stars39k - A JavaScript compiler; use next generation JavaScript, today.
  • PostCSS - 🛠 - 🐙stars24.5k - A tool for transforming CSS with JavaScript.

    • Full stack

    Serverless Stack with React on AWS ↗

  • Serverless Framework - 🛠️ - 🐙stars39.7k - A toolkit for building serverless applications.
  • AWS Lambda - 🛠️ - A compute service that runs your code in response to events.
  • DynamoDB - 🛠️ - Fully managed NoSQL database service.
  • Amazon Cognito - 🛠️ - Securely manage and synchronize app data for your users across their mobile devices.

    • Back-end

    Ethereum DApp ↗

  • Solidity - 🐙stars10.2k - Solidity is an object-oriented, high-level language for implementing smart contracts.
  • web3.js - 🐙stars10.3k - Ethereum JavaScript API.
  • Truffle - 🐙stars10k - A world class development environment, testing framework and asset pipeline for blockchains using the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM).
  • Ganache - 🐙stars2.9k - Personal blockchain for Ethereum development.
  • drizzle - 🐙stars390 - A collection of front-end libraries that make writing dapp user interfaces easier and more predictable.

item.title: stackshareio/awesome-stacks Apr 2nd, 2019
item.description:
Front-end

Vue Enterprise Boilerplate ↗

  • Vue.js - 🛠️ - 🐙stars183.1k - An approachable core library that focuses on the view layer only.
  • Vue Router - 🐙stars18k - Vue Router is the official router for Vue.js.
  • Vue CLI - 🐙stars27.8k - An approachable core library that focuses on the view layer only.
  • Babel - 🛠️ - 🐙stars39k - compiler for writing next generation JavaScript; Babel will turn your ES6+ code into ES5 friendly code, so you can start using it right now without waiting for browser support.
  • Sass - 🛠️ - 🐙stars13.2k - Sass is an extension of CSS3, adding nested rules, variables, mixins, selector inheritance, and more. It's translated to well-formatted, standard CSS using the command line tool or a web-framework plugin.

    • Front-end

    vue-starter ↗

  • TypeScript - 🛠️ - 🐙stars70.7k - A typed superset of JavaScript that compiles to plain JavaScript.
  • Jest - 🛠️ - 🐙stars35.1k - A comprehensive, delightful JavaScript testing solution.
  • Prettier - 🛠️ - 🐙stars39.6k - An opinionated code formatter.
  • Vue.js - 🛠️ - 🐙stars183.1k - An approachable core library that focuses on the view layer only.
  • Vue Router - 🐙stars18k - Vue Router is the official router for Vue.js.

    • Full stack

    MEVN: Mongo Express Vue Node ↗

  • MongoDB - 🛠️ - 🐙stars19.7k - A document and JSON-oriented database.
  • Node.js - 🛠️ - 🐙stars78.9k - Node.js is a JavaScript runtime built on Chrome's V8 JavaScript engine.
  • Vue.js - 🛠️ - 🐙stars183.1k - An approachable core library that focuses on the view layer only.
  • Express - 🛠️ - 🐙stars53k - A minimal and flexible Node.js web application framework.

    • Front-end

    React starter kit ↗

  • React - 🛠 - 🐙stars168.1k - React components can be used on the client and server side.
  • Webpack - 🛠️ - 🐙stars58.2k - A static module bundler for modern JavaScript applications.
  • Express - 🛠️ - 🐙stars53k - A minimal and flexible Node.js web application framework.
  • Node.js - 🛠️ - 🐙stars78.9k - A JavaScript runtime built on Chrome's V8 JavaScript engine.

    • Front-end

    React Firebase starter ↗

  • Material UI - 🛠️ - 🐙stars68.1k - React components that implement Google's Material Design.
  • Relay - 🛠️ - 🐙stars15.7k - A JavaScript framework for building data-driven React applications.
  • GraphQL - 🛠 - 🐙stars17.6k - A query language for APIs and a runtime for fulfilling those queries with your existing data.
